name: codebase
description: Semantic code index: search your repositories by MEANING, not literal text. Chunks each accessible repo, embeds every chunk with the SAME embedding model your memory uses (Settings → Memory), and stores the vectors in a private per-repo index. codebase_search finds the most relevant code/docs for a natural-language query; codebase_reindex (admin) refreshes it incrementally; codebase_status reports coverage. Complements the files plugin's literal search_files.

configSchema.label: Indexing
configSchema.hint: Which files are indexed and how they are chunked.

configSchema.label: Include globs
configSchema.hint: One glob per line (or comma-separated). Only files matching one of these are indexed. Empty = a built-in set of common code + markdown extensions.

configSchema.label: Exclude globs / dirs
configSchema.hint: Directories or globs to skip. A bare name (no slash/star) is treated as a directory name to prune anywhere in the tree.

configSchema.label: Max file size (bytes)
configSchema.hint: Files larger than this are skipped (also skips likely-minified files with very long lines).

configSchema.label: Chunk size (chars)
configSchema.hint: Upper bound on a chunk's size before it is split (prefers blank-line boundaries).

configSchema.label: Search & behavior
configSchema.hint: How results are ranked and when the index refreshes.

configSchema.label: Results per search
configSchema.hint: Default number of matches codebase_search returns (the tool's k argument overrides it).

configSchema.label: Relevance floor
configSchema.hint: Minimum cosine similarity for a match to be returned. Raise it for stricter results; lower it if searches come back empty.

configSchema.label: Auto-reindex on search
configSchema.hint: When on, a search lazily refreshes a repo's index if it is empty or stale (debounced), so you rarely need codebase_reindex.

configSchema.label: Embeds per pass
configSchema.hint: Max chunks embedded in a single indexing pass, so a large repo spreads across passes instead of hammering the provider.

configSchema.label: Embedding model
configSchema.hint: The embedding model is inherited from Settings → Memory (single source of truth) — there is no separate model to configure here. Switching that model rebuilds the index on the next reindex.
